get.description: Get list of brand voices for a location

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of brand voices to return. Defaults to 10, minimum is 1, maximum is 20

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of brand voices to skip for pagination. Defaults to 0, minimum is 0

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search text for brand voice name

parameters.name: deleted
parameters.description: Whether to return deleted brand voices. Defaults to false

info.title: Brand Boards API v3
info.description:
Documentation for Brand Boards API

## API Version v3

All APIs available via `/v3` route prefix with AIP-compliant responses.

bearer.name: Authorization
bearer.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access.name: Authorization
Location-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account (OR) Private Integration Token of Sub-Account.

Location-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Location-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Sub-Account.

Agency-Access.name: Authorization
Agency-Access.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency (OR) Private Integration Token of Agency.

Agency-Access-Only.name: Authorization
Agency-Access-Only.description: Use the Access Token generated with user type as Agency.

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default brand voice

statusCode.description: HTTP status code for invalid location access

message.description: Error message describing the location access failure
message.example: The token does not have access to this location

statusCode.description: HTTP status code for not found

message.description: Error message describing the not found failure

error.example: The requested resource was not found

brandPromise.example: We deliver on time, every time

brandPurpose.example: To empower small businesses with technology

uniqueSellingProposition.example: The only solution that integrates with all major platforms

type.description: Creation type. "manual" creates with provided custom answers, "url" generates answers from a website, "description" generates answers from a text description

url.description: Website URL to generate brand voice from. Required when type is "url"

description.description: Company description to generate brand voice from. Required when type is "description", optional when type is "url"
description.example: We are a tech company focused on innovative solutions for small businesses

answers.description: Brand voice answers. Required when type is "manual"

brandPromise.example: We deliver on time, every time

brandPurpose.example: To empower small businesses with technology

uniqueSellingProposition.example: The only solution that integrates with all major platforms

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default brand voice

deleted.description: Whether the brand voice has been soft deleted

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default brand voice

deleted.description: Whether the brand voice has been soft deleted

brandPromise.example: We deliver on time, every time

brandPurpose.example: To empower small businesses with technology

uniqueSellingProposition.example: The only solution that integrates with all major platforms

isDefault.description: Whether this is the default brand voice

deleted.description: Whether the brand voice has been soft deleted
Whether the brand voice is deleted

brandVoiceId.description: Brand voice ID that was set as default

url.description: Public URL of the logo image. Used for uploading to the brand board folder in media library

label.description: Display label for the logo (e.g., Primary, Secondary)

path.description: Storage path of the logo in the media library

hexa.description: Color in 8-digit hexadecimal notation with alpha channel

rgba.description: Color with red, green, blue, and alpha channel values

locationId.description: Location ID where the brand board will be created

logos.description: Array of logos for the brand board

colors.description: Array of colors for the brand board

fonts.description: Array of fonts for the brand board

default.description: Set as the default brand board for this location

brandBoardId.description: Source brand board ID to copy from (creates a new brand board based on this template)

parentId.description: Parent folder ID in media library for organizing brand boards

type.description: Source type indicating how the brand board was created

url.description: Website URL to extract design kit from (colors, fonts, logos)

updatedBy.description: User ID who last updated the brand board

lastAction.description: Last action performed on the brand board

sourceId.description: Source brand board ID if created from a template

sourceType.description: How the brand board was created

default.description: Whether this is the default brand board for the location

deleted.description: Whether the brand board has been soft deleted

parentId.description: Parent folder ID in media library

folderId.description: Media library folder ID for this brand board

originId.description: Original brand board ID if cloned from snapshot

missingAssets.description: Assets that used fallbacks/defaults (only returned when creating from URL)

default.description: Whether this is the default brand board for the location

brandBoards.description: Array of brand boards for the location

totalCount.description: Total number of brand boards matching the query

logos.description: Array of logos for the brand board

colors.description: Array of colors for the brand board

fonts.description: Array of fonts for the brand board

default.description: Set as the default brand board for this location

parentId.description: Parent folder ID in media library (reserved for future use)
